title: Voices from the Street
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A mainstream novel written in the early 1950s and published posthumously in 2007. Set in a California electronics store, it follows a young salesman's disillusionment and existential crisis. Draws heavily on Dick's own experience working at Art Music in Berkeley. One of the last Dick novels to reach print. Ace Books EPUB edition.
